import os
import typer

app = typer.Typer()

@app.command()
def deploy():
    # Violation: environment variable lookup per command invocation
    env = os.getenv("APP_ENV", "dev")
    print(f"Deploying to {env}")

@app.command()
def rollback():
    env = os.getenv("APP_ENV", "dev")
    print(f"Rolling back in {env}")
